layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: IN THE MATTER OF AN APPLICATION OF

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA FOR

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: AN ORDER AUTHORIZING THE USE OF A

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: PEN REGISTER AND TRAP-AND-TRACE

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: DEVICE ON A CERTAIN TELEPHONE

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: SEALED APPLICATION

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Alex Rossmiller hereby affirms, under penalty of perjury, as follows:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: I am an Assistant United States Attorney in the office of Geoffrey S. Berman, United

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: States Attorney for the Southern District of New York, and I am familiar with this matter.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The Government is seeking an order pursuant to 18 U.S.C. 8 3123 authorizing the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: installation and use of a pen register and trap-and-trace device (the "Requested Pen-Trap") for a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: period of sixty (60) days following the date of this order, on the following phone line (the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: "Target Phone") maintained by T-Mobile (the "Provider").

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The Government is seeking the Requested Pen-Trap in connection with a criminal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: investigation conducted by the Federal Bureau of Investigation (the "Investigating Agency") of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: FNU LNU and others known and unknown (the "Target Subjects"), in connection with possible

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: violations of 21 U.S.C. 8 1591.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Phone number:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Subscriber Name:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Legal Authority

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: TERRAMAR PROJECT

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: A "pen register" is "a device or process which records or decodes dialing, routing,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: addressing, or signaling information transmitted by an instrument or facility from which a wire

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: or electronic communication is transmitted." 18 U.S.C. 8 3127(3). A "trap and trace device" is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: defined as "a device or process which captures the incoming electronic or other impulses which

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: identify the originating number or other dialing, routing, addressing, and signaling information

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: reasonably likely to identify the source of a wire or electronic communication." 18 U.S.C.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In the context of traditional phone communications, pen registers capture the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: destination phone numbers of outgoing calls and texts sent from a phone, while trap and trace

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: communications.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: devices capture the phone numbers of incoming calls and texts received by a phone. Similar

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: principles apply to other kinds of wire and electronic communications, including Internet

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: communications, which most phones today are used to send and receive in addition to phone

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: On the Internet, data transferred between devices is not sent as a continuous

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: stream, but rather the data are split into discrete "packets." Generally, a single communication is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sent as a series of packets. When the packets reach their destination, the receiving device

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: reassembles them into the complete communication. Each packet has two parts: a "header,"

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: which contains routing and control information, and a "payload," which generally contains user

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: data.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In particular, a packet header reflects the following information:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: • the source IP address' from which the packet was sent and the destination IP

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: address to which the packet is directed;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: • the communications port associated with the packet, reflecting the type of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: communication involved (e.g., web, email, FTP); and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: • the date/time of the communication.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1 Every device on the Internet is identified by a unique number called an Internet protocol ("IP")

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: address. This number is used to route information between devices, for example, between two

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: computers.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Certification and Request

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 2 The Government is also not seeking authorization to obtain post-cut-through dialed digits

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ("PCTDD"), or digits that are dialed after a telephone call from the Target Phone has been

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: connected. Pursuant to the attached Order, if possible, the Provider wil forward only pre-cut-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: through-dialed digits to the Investigating Agency. However, if the Provider's technical

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: capabilities require it to forward all dialed digits, including PCTDD, to the Investigating Agency,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the Investigating Agency will only decode and forward to the agents assigned to the investigation

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the numbers that are dialed before the call is cut through.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The information sought through the Requested Pen-Trap does not include the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: "contents" of communications within the meaning of the Wiretap Statute, as it does not include

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: "information concerning the substance, purport, or meaning" of any communication. 18 U.S.C.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 8 2510(8). The Government is not requesting, and does not seek to obtain, the contents of any

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: communications.2

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: I am familiar with the facts of this investigation from my review of relevant

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: records and my discussions with the case agents involved. Based on those records and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: discussions, I hereby certify, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. 8 3123(a)(1), that the information likely to be

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: obtained from the Requested Pen-Trap is relevant to the Investigating Agency's ongoing

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: criminal investigation of the Target Subjects.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Accordingly, the Government requests that the Court enter an order authorizing

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the installation and use of the Requested Pen-Trap to collect the phone numbers and/or IP

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: addresses and communications ports associated with any phone, text, or data communications to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: or from the Target Phone, along with the date, time, and duration (but not the contents) of the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: communication, for a period of 60 days.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 10. The Government further requests, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. 88 3123(b)(2) and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 3124(a)-(b), that the Order direct the Provider and any other person or entity providing wire or

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: electronic communication service in the United States whose assistance may facilitate execution

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Dated: New York, New York

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: January 7, 2020

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Alex Rossmiller

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 13. The Government further requests, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. 8 3123(d), that the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Provider and its agents and employees be directed to refrain from disclosing the Requested Pen-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Trap or the existence of the underlying investigation, except as necessary to effectuate the Order,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: unless and until authorized by this Court, and that the Clerk of Court be directed to seal the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Order (and this Application) until further order of this Court, except that copies may be retained

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: by the United States Attorney's Office and the Investigating Agency.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 11. The Government further requests that the Order direct that the information

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: collected through the Requested Pen-Trap be furnished to the Investigating Agency at reasonable

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: intervals during regular business hours for the duration of the Order.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of this Order to furnish, upon service of the Order, any information, facilities, and technical

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: assistance necessary to install the Requested Pen-Trap unobtrusively and with minimum

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: disruption of normal service. Any entity providing such assistance shall be reasonably

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: compensated by the Investigating Agency, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. 8 3124(c), for reasonable

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expenses incurred in providing facilities and assistance in furtherance of this Order.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 12. The Government further requests that the Order direct the Provider to notify the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Investigating Agency of any changes relating to the Target Phone, including changes to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: subscriber information, and to provide prior notice to the Investigating Agency before

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: terminating service to the Target Phone.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The foregoing is affirmed under the penalties of perjury, pursuant to 28 U.S.C. 8 1746.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Assistant United States Attorney

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Southern District of New York

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: PEN REGISTER AND TRAP-AND-TRACE

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: DEVICE ON A CERTAIN TELEPHONE

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: WHEREAS the applicant has certified that the information likely to be obtained from the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Requested Pen-Trap is relevant to an ongoing criminal investigation conducted by the Federal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Bureau of Investigation (the "Investigating Agency") of FNU LNU and others known and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: unknown in connection with possible violations of 21 U.S.C. 8 1591.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Phone number:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: SEALED ORDER

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Subscriber Name:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: TERRAMAR PROJECT

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. 88 3121-26, that the Investigating

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Agency may direct the Provider to install the Requested Pen-Trap to identify the phone numbers

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and/or IP addresses and communications ports associated with any phone, text, or data

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: communications to or from the Target Phone, along with the date, time, and duration (but not the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: contents) of such communications; 1

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1 The Provider is not required to provide post-cut-through dialed digits ("PCTDD"), or digits that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: are dialed after a telephone call from the Target Phone has been connected. If possible, the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Provider will forward only pre-cut-through-dialed digits to the Investigating Agency. However,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: if the Provider's technical capabilities require it to forward all dialed digits, including PCTDD, to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: WHEREAS an application has been made by Alex Rossmiller, an Assistant U.S.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Attorney in the Southern District of New York, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. 88 3121-26, for an order

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: authorizing the installation and use of a pen register and trap-and-trace device (the "Requested

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Pen-Trap") on the following phone line (the "Target Phone") maintained by T-Mobile (the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: "Provider"):

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: O MAG247

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: IT IS FURTHER ORDERED, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. 8 3123(c)(1), that the use of the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Requested Pen-Trap is authorized for 60 days from the date of this Order;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: IT IS FURTHER ORDERED that the Provider be compensated by the Investigating

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Agency for reasonable expenses incurred in executing this Order;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: IT IS FURTHER ORDERED, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. 8 3123(b), that the Provider not

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: disclose the Requested Pen-Trap or the existence of the underlying investigation to any person,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: except as necessary to effectuate this Order, unless or until otherwise ordered by the Court, and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that this Order be sealed until otherwise ordered by this Court, except that copies may be

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: IT IS FURTHER ORDERED that the Provider notify the Investigating Agency of any

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: changes relating to the Target Phone, including changes to subscriber information, and provide

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: prior notice to the Investigating Agency before terminating service to the Target Phone; and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: IT IS FURTHER ORDERED, pursuant to 18 U.S.C. 8 3123(b)(2), that the Provider

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: furnish any information, facilities, and technical assistance necessary to accomplish the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: installation and operation of the Requested Pen-Trap unobtrusively and with a minimum of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: disruption of normal service;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: IT IS FURTHER ORDERED that the results of the Requested Pen-Trap shall be

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: furnished to the Investigating Agency at reasonable intervals during regular business hours for

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the duration of this Order;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the Investigating Agency, the Investigating Agency will only decode and forward to the agents

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: assigned to the investigation, the numbers that are dialed before the call is cut through.
